---
title: "Minimal Bookdown Test"
author: "Your Name"
output:
  bookdown::gitbook:
    split_by: chapter
---

# Minimal Bookdown Test

Welcome! If this builds, your bookdown setup works.

This is the index page. The **next chapter** will test Markdown and R code.


# Chapter 1: Test

This is a test chapter.

## Text
Some **bold**, *italic*, and normal text.

## R Code Test

```{r}
plot(cars, main = "Bookdown Test Plot")


---

# ✔ File 3 — `_bookdown.yml`

Create a file named `_bookdown.yml`:
